messages.text:
BL-499 — Chase sweep re-chases forever a new/ handoff already resolved in completed/: the BL-218 already-processed skip is not applied at sweep time, so a stale duplicate wakes an active recipient indefinitely, silently
What it solves: ROOT CAUSE (traced in code, grep-confirmed against swarmforge/scripts/chase_sweep_lib.bb):
  - sweep-role-inbox! (L281) -> scan-inbox-new (L80) enumerates EVERY *.handoff in
    inbox/new/ with NO dedup against completed/ or abandoned/. It does not apply the
    BL-218 already-processed skip that t…
Approval context: New defect fix for a SILENT, live daemon bug: the chase sweep re-chases forever a new/ handoff whose work is already completed (it wakes an active agent every cycle, chaseCount hit 12+, never surfaced). FIRM in the scenario contract: the sweep reuses the existing BL-218 already-terminal check and R…
BL-499 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-499" (or "reject BL-499 <reason>") to act.
